title: HENBRANDT 2 x Children’s Turkey Shooter 11cm Novelty Flick a Turkey Catapult for Kids Stretchy Chicken Slingshot Rubber Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Fillers Stocking Fillers for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 2 Turkey Shooter stretchy toys for kids.

These stretchy finger slingshot toys are bright yellow and shaped like poultry, and they make fantastic party favours, loot bag fillers, pocket money toys, classroom gifts, Christmas stocking fillers, small gifts, lucky dip prizes, and more.

Simply hook the rubber fowl onto your fingertip using the hole beneath the head, stretch it back by pulling the tail, aim, and release! Do not aim at other people and be aware that if stuck to walls or ceilings, the sticky catapault toys may stain.
description: Product description These stretchy mini turkey shooter toys are fantastic party bag fillers, class rewards and teacher gifts for children, novelty presents, pocket money toys, stocking fillers, and more. The turkey shooters are easy to use, simply hook the rubber fowl onto your fingertip using the hole beneath the head, stretch it back by pulling the tail, aim, and release! The finger slingshot is a bright and cheery yellow, which makes them visually appealing to children, as well as easy to find once you have catapulted the shooters into far-off corners of the room! If you are feeling particularly adventurous, why not compete with your friends and see whose turkey shooter flies the furthest? The chicken slingshot toys are non-toxic, odorless and designed to withstand hours of play. If the stretchy rubber chicken becomes dirty from repeated play, simply wash it in warm soapy water to return the plastic poultry plaything to its original vibrant yellow. The elasticity and viscosity of the stretchy toy will not be compromised by washing either, preserving the longevity of your favourite stretchy toy. The stretchy turkey shooter toys measure 11cm from beak to tail, and they are individually packed in blister packs, which makes them perfect party prizes and novelty gifts. Please be advised: These stretchy toys can leave marks on walls and ceilings. Furthermore, when releasing the finger slingshot toys, do not aim at people. Pack of 2 Turkey Shooter toys in blister packs per order. Recommended for ages 3+ and adult supervision is recommended. This product has been tested to EN71 and REACH regulations and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, Small parts.
